user.title: Connect to BraiinsOS Miner
user.description: Enter the IP address (or hostname) and CGMiner API port of your BraiinsOS miner.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the miner. Check the host/IP and port, and ensure the miner is online.
error.api_error: The miner returned an unexpected API response. Check that BraiinsOS is running.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
